relations.note: Both rules govern the visual color palette and separation in chart elements.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Ensure a clean, easy-to-scan, and highly recognizable container format for all data displays.
rules.rule_text: Chart panels must use a uniform corner radius (radius.infographic.panel = 12px), a Light Blue background (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9), and a Brand Blue rounded header bar (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b).

quotes: Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.

rules.intent: Maintain rigorous semantic clarity in visual representations of data.
rules.rule_text: In charts and infographics, Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) and Sky Blue (color.secondary.sky_blue = #358CCB) must be dominant. Sunshine (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) and Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) must be reserved exclusively for emphasis on key figures/data points, and neutral gray must be used for placebo or comparator markers.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Align infographic visual metaphors with the brand's friendly and accessible design system.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons must feature rounded, approachable shapes (such as rounded bar tops).

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Maintain strict, unified typography treatments for graphic identifiers across media channels.
rules.rule_text: In digital assets, chart section headlines must use the Nunito Sans font family (font.family.nunito_sans = 'Nunito Sans'), capitalized in ALL CAPS (case.campaign.headline = 'all_caps'), colored in Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b), and must feature a thin Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) rule directly beneath.

quotes: Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.

rules.intent: Establish an immediate hierarchical reading order for numerical data highlights.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callout elements within charts must lead with a large, bold metric/percentage (acting as the hero component), with supporting explanatory copy placed immediately beneath in a lighter text weight.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Prevent layout clutter and ensure visual distinction between main findings and supplementary notes.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes must be set in a noticeably smaller type scale (type_scale.footnote = {'line_height': '18px', 'size': '12px'}) and clearly separated from primary statistical data via layout spacing.
